description_long: This is a modern bullpup-style rifle with a striking red and black color scheme, featuring angular lines and a compact profile. The main body is predominantly red with black accents, including a black rail system on top for mounting optics and accessories. The rifle has a detachable box magazine, a pistol grip, and a prominent trigger guard. The barrel is relatively short and ends with a small muzzle device, likely a flash hider or compensator. The stock is integrated into the rear of the weapon, characteristic of bullpup designs, allowing for a shorter overall length without sacrificing barrel length. The surface appears to be made of metal and polymer, giving it a durable yet lightweight construction suitable for urban environments.
description: A compact, red and black bullpup rifle with a detachable magazine, top rail, and short barrel with a muzzle device. Its modern design features angular lines and a mix of metal and polymer materials.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the red and black color scheme, top rail, and detachable magazine.
description_view_1: Front view focusing on the barrel and muzzle device, with the top rail and compact width visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the magazine, trigger, and integrated stock, mirroring the main features from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the stock and the narrow profile of the rifle.
